title: Aligning Scepters
description: A mod adding magic with scepters into minecraft, Divine Intervention, adds weapons and magic of mass amounts and variations.
body:
# <ins>CURRENTLY UNDERGOING A COMPLETE REWRITE</ins>!

   * a preview containing some old content is available, but it's recommended to wait for the full release!
   * beta may contain bugs, and is also a heavily stripped down version of the current in-development mod.
   * older versions are unsupported

## Info
Curseforge versions are now unsupported

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891129ed0579613fbf3373c37b02412425bcb544.png)

### Extra info
Want to help the final version get released faster support me on my patreon: [Here](https://www.patreon.com/c/InitsuIgnis)
